title: OPA Authorization Configuration
description: Configuration for the OPA authorization extension. Evaluates Open Policy Agent policies inline to authorize HTTP requests.

policies.description: OPA policies to load and evaluate. At least one policy is required.

decision_path.description: OPA rule path to query for the authorization decision. Defaults to "envoy.authz.allow".

fail_open.description: If true, allow requests when policy evaluation fails. Defaults to false.

dry_run.description: If true, log authorization decisions without enforcing them. Defaults to false.

with_body.description: If true, buffer the request body and include it as parsed JSON in the OPA input. Defaults to false.

metadata_namespaces.description: List of dynamic metadata namespaces to include in the OPA input document under the "dynamic_metadata" key.

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.
